center.name: 约翰内斯堡
center.summary: 约翰内斯堡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Cape weaver，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Cape weaver (Ploceus capensis) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae, found in southern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Cape weaver (Ploceus capensis) is a species of bird in the weaver family, Ploceidae, found in southern Africa
